segments.caption: The video begins in a modern, upscale restaurant with large glass windows offering a panoramic view of a cityscape at dusk. The setting is elegant, with marble tables, white chairs, and ambient lighting from candles and overhead fixtures. A group of men, including the man in black t-shirt (wearing an 'ARMANI EXCHANGE' shirt) and the man in patterned blue shirt, are seated at a table, engaging in conversation while reviewing a menu. The man in black t-shirt gestures as he speaks, and the man in maroon t-shirt (wearing a red 'ANIMAL EXCHANGE' shirt) listens attentively. Waitstaff in white shirts and black vests move through the space, attending to other tables. The camera pans across the restaurant, capturing the open layout with glass partitions revealing a well-lit bar area adorned with golden spherical lights. The scene transitions to a darkened IMAX theater, where a movie trailer for 'JAWAN' is playing on a large curved screen. The audience is seated in reclining chairs, watching the action-packed trailer with scenes of combat and explosions. The screen displays the release date: '7th September 2023'. The video then shifts to a cozy living room at night, where a group of men are playing FIFA on a large wall-mounted TV. The man in black t-shirt is seated cross-legged on a gray rug, holding a controller, while the man in maroon t-shirt sits beside him. Another man in a striped t-shirt is lounging on a gray sofa, holding a red and blue bottle. The room is softly lit by a floor lamp, and a coffee table holds a green bottle, a glass of wine, and a box of tissues. On-screen text reads 'Playing FIFA around night time', indicating the casual, relaxed atmosphere of the gaming session.

segments.caption: In a cozy living room illuminated by a warm floor lamp, three men are engrossed in a FIFA soccer game displayed on a wall-mounted TV. The man in the black t-shirt, seated cross-legged on the gray rug, actively controls the game with a controller, while the man in the gray t-shirt sits beside him, also focused on the screen. A third man reclines on the gray sofa, casually observing the game and occasionally glancing at his phone. The TV screen shows a vibrant green soccer field with players in motion, transitioning to a post-match statistics screen displaying team formations and player ratings. The room features a coffee table with a green bottle, a glass of wine, and a box of tissues, while a tall potted plant adds a touch of greenery. The atmosphere is relaxed and social, with the men engaged in the gaming session, occasionally gesturing and reacting to the on-screen action. The on-screen text overlay 'Playing FIFA around night time' appears, reinforcing the context of the scene.
